name: Credit Recovery Follow-ups
report_script:
f = filters or {}
view = f.get("view") or "Detail"
conds = {"parenttype": "Credit Recovery"}
if f.get("from_date") and f.get("to_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = ["between", [f.get("from_date"), f.get("to_date")]]
elif f.get("from_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = [">=", f.get("from_date")]
elif f.get("to_date"):
    conds["follow_up_date"] = ["<=", f.get("to_date")]
if f.get("outcome"):
    conds["outcome"] = f.get("outcome")
if f.get("logged_by"):
    conds["logged_by"] = f.get("logged_by")

rows = frappe.get_all("Credit Recovery Follow-up",
    filters=conds,
    fields=["follow_up_date", "outcome", "promised_amount", "promised_date",
            "next_follow_up_date", "logged_by", "notes", "parent"],
    order_by="follow_up_date desc, creation desc",
    limit_page_length=0)

parent_names = list(set([r.parent for r in rows]))
parents = {}
if parent_names:
    for d in frappe.get_all("Credit Recovery",
            filters={"name": ["in", parent_names]},
            fields=["name", "customer", "outstanding_amount", "recovery_status",
                    "next_follow_up_date", "promised_amount", "promised_payment_date",
                    "last_contact_date"],
            limit_page_length=0):
        parents[d.name] = d

if f.get("customer"):
    rows = [r for r in rows if parents.get(r.parent) and parents[r.parent].customer == f.get("customer")]

if view == "By Customer":
    seen = {}
    counts = {}
    for r in rows:
        counts[r.parent] = counts.get(r.parent, 0) + 1
        if r.parent not in seen:
            seen[r.parent] = r
    result = []
    for pname, last in seen.items():
        p = parents.get(pname)
        if not p:
            continue
        result.append([p.customer, p.outstanding_amount, p.recovery_status,
                       last.follow_up_date, last.outcome, p.promised_amount,
                       p.promised_payment_date, p.next_follow_up_date,
                       counts.get(pname, 0), pname])
    result.sort(key=lambda x: (x[7] or "9999-12-31"))
    columns = [
        {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 190},
        {"label": "Outstanding", "fieldname": "outstanding_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 110},
        {"label": "Status", "fieldname": "recovery_status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 125},
        {"label": "Last Contact", "fieldname": "last_contact", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Last Outcome", "fieldname": "last_outcome", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 130},
        {"label": "Promised", "fieldname": "promised_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Promised Date", "fieldname": "promised_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Next Follow-up", "fieldname": "next_follow_up", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Logs", "fieldname": "log_count", "fieldtype": "Int", "width": 55},
        {"label": "Record", "fieldname": "record", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Credit Recovery", "width": 130},
    ]
else:
    result = []
    for r in rows:
        p = parents.get(r.parent)
        result.append([r.follow_up_date, p.customer if p else None, r.outcome,
                       r.promised_amount, r.promised_date, r.next_follow_up_date,
                       r.logged_by, r.notes, r.parent])
    columns = [
        {"label": "Date", "fieldname": "follow_up_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 95},
        {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 180},
        {"label": "Outcome", "fieldname": "outcome", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 140},
        {"label": "Promised", "fieldname": "promised_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Promised Date", "fieldname": "promised_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 105},
        {"label": "Next Follow-up", "fieldname": "next_follow_up_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 110},
        {"label": "Logged By", "fieldname": "logged_by", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "User", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Notes", "fieldname": "notes", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 300},
        {"label": "Record", "fieldname": "record", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Credit Recovery", "width": 130},
    ]
data = columns, result

name: VAC Customer Ledger Summary
report_script:
std = frappe.get_doc("Report", "Customer Ledger Summary")
data = std.execute_script_report(filters or {})
